---
title: "Course 4 — Schedule"
toc: true
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.kicker}
COURSE 4 · ML & HIGH-DIM
:::
# Schedule
::: {.lead}
Every lab, every deck, every R script for Course 4.
:::
:::

| Week | # | Topic | Article | Slides | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 1 | Cross-validation, nested CV, bootstrap | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session1.R) |
| 1 | 2 | Regularisation: ridge, lasso, elastic net | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session2.R) |
| 1 | 3 | PCA, FA, CCA, LDA | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session3.R) |
| 1 | 4 | Clustering: k-means, hierarchical, model-based | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session4.R) |
| 1 | 5 | UMAP and t-SNE | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session5.R) |
| 2 | 6 | Trees, random forests, boosting | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session1.R) |
| 2 | 7 | Interpretability and SHAP | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session2.R) |
| 2 | 8 | Tabular neural networks with torch | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session3.R) |
| 2 | 9 | Imaging and sequence models intro | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session4.R) |
| 2 | 10 | tidymodels pipelines | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session5.R) |
| 3 | 11 | Bayesian thinking; α vs decision error | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session1.R) |
| 3 | 12 | brms / Stan, LOO, hierarchical | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session2.R) |
| 3 | 13 | Biomarker statistics | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session3.R) |
| 3 | 14 | Survival ML | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session4.R) |
| 3 | 15 | Time-dependent Brier, IPA, external validation | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session5.R) |
| 4 | 16 | RNA-seq with DESeq2/edgeR | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session1.R) |
| 4 | 17 | Enrichment analysis | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session2.R) |
| 4 | 18 | scRNA-seq with Seurat | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session3.R) |
| 4 | 19 | FDR, knockoffs, replication crisis | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session4.R) |
| 4 | 20 | TRIPOD-AI, fairness, reproducibility at scale | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session5.R) |
